column1: # Curated TAB-separated list of upstream tests that the C# SDK deliberately
# does NOT port. The companion script `coverage-map.sh` reads this file when
# building `coverage-map.tsv` and accepts each row as an explicit N/A
# mapping. PR-3 enables the `--check` gate, after which any row with an
# Reason conventions (mirror the plan's Section 6.1 list):
#   not-ported: <symbol>       — C# does not expose this upstream API.
#   e2e-only: live-backend     — upstream only exercises this under a live
#                                Turnkey backend; C# defers to Tier-4 opt-in.
#   proof-fixture-only: PR-11  — covered indirectly by ProofFixtureProvenanceTests.
# not call any of these symbols.
# ---- proof verifier (proof-tests.ts) — all N/A, proof scope-out ----

column2: proof-fixture-only: PR-11 — proof verifier not ported; PR-11 adds ProofFixtureProvenanceTests for the JSON golden values
proof-fixture-only: PR-11 — proof verifier not ported; PR-11 covers the JSON golden values via provenance assertion
proof-fixture-only: PR-11 — proof verifier not ported; malformed-app-proof negative path requires C# verify implementation (out of scope)
proof-fixture-only: PR-11 — proof verifier not ported; malformed-boot-proof negative path requires C# verify implementation (out of scope)

column1: # ---- decryptExportBundle - PR-3 will add C# tests; for PR-2 these stay MISSING ----
# (No N/A row — PR-3 will replace MISSING with a REVIEWED annotation on the new C# test.)
# ---- signature-test.ts test.each — 4 sign variants on line 17, 3 stamp variants on line 52 ----
# Both rows represent test.each templates with multiple runtime variants. The C#
# port covers only the PureJS variant; nodecrypto / WebCrypto / universal are
# documented runtime-variants. We classify the entire test.each row as N/A and
# document the partial coverage in the variant_notes column below. The PureJS
# coverage IS asserted by ApiKeyStamperTests (deterministic RFC 6979), so this
# is a documentation N/A, not a true coverage gap.

column2: runtime-variant: nodecrypto / WebCrypto / universal not ported; PureJS variant covered by ApiKeyStamperTests.SignWithApiKey_DeterministicWithRfc6979 (file tests/ApiKeyStamperTests.cs:125)

runtime-variant: openssl-keypair stamp under nodecrypto / WebCrypto / universal not ported; PureJS-equivalent coverage is the random-key generator path in ApiKeyStamperTests.SignWithApiKey_ProducesDerHexThatVerifies (file tests/ApiKeyStamperTests.cs:111)

e2e-only: live-backend — grpc status detail decoding requires a real backend error response; peak monorepo surfaces these via TurnkeyRequestError from @turnkey/sdk-server (not the @turnkey/http layer this SDK ports)
